structure.description: Configuration entity exposes both UI YAML editor and copy-as-CLI snippet against same model. UI form for ad-hoc edits; CLI string for CI/IaC. Both materialize to identical config record.

rationale.hypothesis: Config-as-data needs two reader audiences: humans who tweak occasionally (UI) and automation that reproduces (CLI/file). One surface alienates the other; offering both with shared model preserves single source of truth.

evidence.description: Ingestion recipe — YAML editor in UI + CLI command for CI
Workflow file editable in UI + .yml in repo

counterexample.description: If users never automate, dual surface is overhead

shouldMatch.reason: Workflow definition editable as YAML or via UI
